name: Greg Wells
bio: Greg Wells is an Electronic Warfare Specialist and U.S. Army veteran from Pleasant View, Tennessee who trained through Jungle Warfare, Arctic Warfare, Ranger School, Special Forces, and SERE school. He developed his survival skills from years of camping, hunting, and military deployments across six continents. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Frozen in Fear}}, partnered with biologist Cassie Turner for a 21-day challenge in Canada.

name: Gwen Knapp
note: Could not verify on approved sources

name: Hakim Isler
bio: Hakim Isler, known as "The Black MacGyver," is a survival expert, Iraq War combat veteran, and sixth-degree black belt in To-Shin Do (Ninjutsu) based in Fayetteville, North Carolina, where he runs the Elevo Dynamics martial arts and fitness facility. He founded The SOIL Foundation, a nonprofit offering off-grid training to help veterans, law enforcement, and civilians heal from anxiety, depression, and PTSD. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Himalayan Hell}} and on the first 40-day {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} challenge in Colombia.

name: Honora Bowen
bio: Honora Bowen is an American actress, singer, athlete, and activist born in Chicago and raised in New York and Vermont as a ski racer and snowboarder. She is a feminist, animal-rights advocate, and rock climber who became a professional nude model for the climbing publication Stone Nudes, and is credited as the originator of the "lettuce bikini" worn by PETA activists. She competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in the badlands of Colombia.

name: Jaclyn McCaffrey
bio: Jaclyn McCaffrey is a wildlife educator and primitive-skills teacher from Mesa, Arizona, born in 1989. She is known as a free-spirited vegetarian who prefers to live off the plant-based bounty of the land. She partnered with Adam Young on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Jungle Love}}, surviving 21 days in the jungles of Nicaragua and battling poisonous snakes and dehydration.

name: Jay Hertzberg
bio: Jay Hertzberg, also known as "Jungle Jay" and credited as James 'Jay' Simms, is a delivery man from Maryland who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid of Love}} in 2021. He was 25 at the time of filming and described himself as being on a self-development journey while looking for romance on the island.

name: Jeff Zausch
bio: Jeff Zausch is a survival expert and TV personality born and raised in Pocatello, Idaho, who graduated from Idaho State University and worked in geographic information systems at the Idaho Museum of Natural History before pursuing survival full-time. He holds the record for most cumulative days on the franchise, completed the first-ever 60-day challenge with Laura Zerra in the Philippines, and was hospitalized for severe meningitis afterward. He has appeared multiple times on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}, and co-hosted Discovery's Dual Survival.

name: Jeremy McCaa
bio: Jeremy McCaa is a survivalist from Monroe, Louisiana who grew up hunting, fishing, and mud bogging in the Louisiana outdoors. He made his {{series:Naked and Afraid}} debut in 2015 in the Philippines and returned for {{ep:Curse of the Swamp}}, where he set a series record by enduring 25 days in the Atchafalaya Basin. He also competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL: Frozen}} in Montana.

name: Joe Brandl
bio: Joe Brandl is a longtime outdoorsman, scoutmaster, and tannery owner from Dubois, Wyoming, where he moved in 1985 to work for Wyoming Game and Fish. At 55, he became one of the oldest participants on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, surviving 21 days in Namibia in the 2015 episode {{ep:The Darkest Hour}}.

name: Jonathan Klay
bio: Jonathan Klay is a Los Angeles-based former Recon Marine and bodyguard who works in high-threat close protection. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Season 1 Maldives episode {{ep:Island from Hell}} alongside Alison Teal, and his other credits include Beverly Hills Pawn and God's Speed.

name: Joshua Bell
bio: Joshua Bell is a survivalist nicknamed 'Duct Tape Boy' after choosing a roll of duct tape as his item for {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Season 3 episode {{ep:Nicaragua Nightmare}} (2014). He later returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} Season 6, attempting a 40-day challenge in the South African wilderness.

name: Kaila Cumings
bio: Kaila Cumings is a custom knife maker, hunter, and survivalist from Troy, New Hampshire who runs her own knifemaking studio. She has appeared multiple times on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}}, forging a new custom knife for each challenge, and was the first woman on the show to take a big-game animal with a bow when she killed a warthog in South Africa.

name: Kellie Nightlinger
bio: Kellie Nightlinger is an Alaska-based survivalist, hunting/fishing guide and wild edible plants expert who has taught primitive living skills for over two decades. She paired with EJ Snyder on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in Tanzania, becoming part of one of the first opposite-sex duos to complete the 21-day challenge. She also runs an adventure-based youth camp for kids who have lost a parent or come from difficult backgrounds.

name: Kim Kelly
bio: Kim Kelly is a Utah-based river guide, mountain biker, and rock climber who earned a B.S. in Recreation Resource Management from Utah State University in 2018. She appeared on multiple seasons of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in South Africa, Panama, and Belize, and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Alone}}. She feels most at home exploring the red rock backcountry of her native Utah.

name: Kim Lemons

name: Kim Shelton
bio: Kim Shelton is a wilderness/nature awareness graduate of the Wilderness Awareness School (Anake program) and a designer based in the Pacific Northwest. She appeared in the very first episode of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, filmed in Costa Rica. She continues to work in nature-based education and design.

name: Kristin Young
bio: Kristin Young is an oncology nurse and mother of two from Mount Gilead, Ohio. She entered {{series:Naked and Afraid}} through a fan challenge with partner Paolo Di Girolamo II, and the pair endured 14 days in the Chocoyero-El Brujo Natural Reserve in Nicaragua, where they survived on grasshoppers, snakes, and termites.

name: Kyle Snape
bio: Kyle Snape is a survivalist who has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including a Colombian jungle challenge alongside partner MaLu where the pair endured swarms of biting insects. He has spoken publicly about the mental and physical toll of long-form survival challenges. Kyle has shared his experience on the Survival Debrief podcast.

name: Larsen Honigsfeld
note: No info on approved sources

name: Laura Zerra
bio: Laura Zerra is a New Hampshire-born expert survivalist, primitive skills practitioner, and adventure traveler who studied Ethnobiology at Connecticut College. She is one of the most-watched veterans of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, known for her self-reliant approach and primal-living philosophy. She shares more about her ancestral-living diet and approach at The Shaman Diet.

name: Lauren Brandwein
note: Could not confirm on approved sources

name: Leah Chandler
bio: Leah Chandler is a mom, author, wildlife scientist, and founder of Inward Survival. She has appeared on multiple challenges of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including episodes filmed in Croatia, South Africa, and a Mayan jungle where an injury tested her resolve.

name: Luke McLaughlin
bio: Luke McLaughlin is a primitive-skills teacher, naturalist, and founder of the Holistic Survival School outside Grand Rapids, Michigan. The North Carolina native has completed multiple {{series:Naked and Afraid}} challenges including a 21-day run in Namibia and a 41-day stint in Colombia, and went on to face the South African wilderness on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Alone}}. He has committed his life to mastering and teaching indigenous living skills.

name: Makani Nalu
bio: Makani Nalu, born Natalie Paul in Worcester, Massachusetts, moved to Hawaii at 17 and adopted a Hawaiian name meaning "wind" and "waves." A certified yoga instructor and model based in Venice, California, she first won the debut season of Stranded with a Million Dollars before joining {{series:Naked and Afraid}} as a third survivalist in Ecuador, where she became part of the show's first all-woman duo to complete a challenge. She has also competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Maleah Bell
note: No info on approved sources

name: Mama Kel
bio: Kelly Roske, known on the show as "Mama Kel," was cast as an earth-mother survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and traveled to South Africa for {{ep:Stalked on All Sides}}, where she finished the 21-day challenge solo after her partner had to leave due to injury. Since the show, she has built a new life in Mexico.

name: Martin Sims
bio: Martin "Marlin" Sims is a professional boxer born in Chicago and raised in Minneapolis who now lives in Tampa, Florida. On {{series:Naked and Afraid}} he attempted a 21-day challenge in Africa in {{ep:Hit by Hippos}}, where he and his partner contended with hippos and crocodiles.

name: Matthew Garland
bio: Matthew Garland is a survivalist from Benton, Arkansas who co-runs American Patriot Guns and Gifts with his wife and operates the non-profit Bare Bones Bushcraft, offering survival training to first responders, veterans and Eagle Scouts. On {{series:Naked and Afraid}} he survived in Arizona's Chiricahua Wilderness in {{ep:Shart Attack}} and later returned for a 21-day challenge in Zambia's Valley of the Leopards.

name: Max Djenohan
bio: Max Djenohan is a survivalist, snowboarder and outdoor adventurer from Edmonds, Washington who has spent nearly 200 days in the wilderness across multiple {{series:Naked and Afraid}} appearances. He competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and went solo in {{ep:Max Pushed to the Max}}, and later returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}} in the Australian Outback. He has also appeared on NBC's Race to Survive: Alaska.

name: Megan Forsythe
bio: Megan "Sunny" Forsythe is a Canadian survivalist with a medical background from Parksville on Vancouver Island, British Columbia. On {{series:Naked and Afraid}} she postponed her wedding to take on a 21-day challenge in the mosquito-infested Colombian tropics with British commando Steven Kelly in {{ep:Runaway Bride}}.

name: Melanie Rauscher
bio: Melanie Rauscher was a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2013 and later on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in 2015. She was found dead in July 2022 at age 35 in Prescott, Arizona; the Yavapai County Medical Examiner ruled the cause as difluoroethane (aerosol dust cleaner) toxicity.

name: Melissa Miller
bio: Melissa Miller is a Michigan native and outdoor educator who taught nature and wilderness survival in Michigan's largest park system after earning a teaching degree from the University of Michigan. She has completed three {{series:Naked and Afraid}} challenges (in the Amazon, the South African Selati Basin on XL, and the Florida swamplands) and works in social media and digital marketing for BLADE Magazine and BLADE Show.

name: Michelle Armogida
bio: Michelle "Shell" Armogida is a farmer, U.S. Air Force veteran and space-industry professional from Mims, Florida who works at Farm & Forage FL teaching sustainable small-scale farming. On {{series:Naked and Afraid}} she fought to survive 21 days in South Africa in {{ep:Death by Crocodile}}, and she returned for a 40-day challenge on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Nathan Rouw
bio: Nathan Rouw spent seven years as an experimental archaeology instructor at an archaeological and foraging lifeways school in West Texas, traveling from Alaska to the Amazon to test the foraging potential of different bioregions. He served as a consultant and trainer for Discovery's I, Caveman and Man vs. Wild before competing on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}.
